creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
devel/samurai was compatible enough with devel/ninja in almost all cases, including for www/chromium 111.* and earlier.

But for www/chromium 112.*, build fails using samurai instead of ninja as below.

devel/ninja didn't exhibit the error and build finished fine, even if "ALLOW_MAKE_JOBS=yes" is enabled in /usr/local/etc/poudriere.conf.


  ===== Errors exhibited (Commented out "ALLOW_MAKE_JOBS=yes" in poudriere.conf) =====
